message:
🐛 Filter queue by logged-in user and remove redundant SQLite fields (#1216)

* ✨ Add architecture note to demo mode setup dialog

- Add "How it works" section to SetupInstructionsDialog showing the
  Browser → Frontend → Backend → kc-agent → Clusters data flow
- Clarifies that console.kubestellar.io is demo-only
- Update demo banner text to say "install locally to monitor your
  real clusters" instead of just "showing sample data"

Closes #1203

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Filter queue by logged-in user and remove redundant SQLite fields

- Queue now fetches only issues created by the logged-in user
  (creator= filter) instead of all repo issues
- Removed github_issue_url from SQLite and model — GitHub is the
  source of truth, URL is constructed from issue number where needed
- Kept github_issue_number in SQLite for webhook linking

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -61,7 +61,6 @@ type FeatureRequest struct {
 	Description       string        `json:"description"`
 	RequestType       RequestType   `json:"request_type"`
 	GitHubIssueNumber *int          `json:"github_issue_number,omitempty"`
-	GitHubIssueURL    string        `json:"github_issue_url,omitempty"`
 	Status            RequestStatus `json:"status"`
 	PRNumber          *int          `json:"pr_number,omitempty"`
 	PRURL             string        `json:"pr_url,omitempty"`

@@ -316,7 +316,7 @@ export function Layout({ children }: LayoutProps) { Demo Mode - Showing sample data from all cloud providers + Showing sample data only — install locally to monitor your real clusters

@@ -53,6 +53,35 @@ export function SetupInstructionsDialog({ isOpen, onClose }: SetupInstructionsDi
+ {/* Architecture note */} +
+
+
+ i +
+
+

+ console.kubestellar.io is a demo — it shows sample data only. + To monitor your real clusters, install the console locally or in a cluster: +

+
+ Browser + {' \u2192 '} + Frontend + {' \u2192 '} + Backend + {' \u2192 '} + kc-agent + {' \u2192 '} + Your clusters +
+

+ The kc-agent reads your kubeconfig and streams live data from all your clusters to the console. +

+
+
+
+ {/* Single-step quickstart */}
